title: Three UFOs filmed moving at random [2013]
excerpt: OCT 6th, 2013. Around 1:44 am in the city of Santo Antônio da Patrulha, State of Rio Grande do Sul, a journalist spotted and recorded on video [see below] three white round UFO’s, apparently small in size and varying the speed as they moved at random, “crossing and grouping in a single focus”. text_preview: OCT 6th, 2013. Around 1:44 am in the city of Santo Antônio da Patrulha, State of Rio Grande do Sul, a journalist spotted and recorded on video [see below] three white round UFO’s, apparently small in size and varying the speed as they moved at random, “crossing and grouping in a single focus”. The UFO’s were about 200 meters high and above a high ground, and at a distance of approximately 1,200 meters from the eyewitness. The report of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] also informs that the sighting took place in conditions of visibility somewhat impaired by the existing fog at th
summary: A journalist filmed three small white round UFOs at ~200 m altitude for over 7 minutes, moving randomly and grouping near Santo Antônio da Patrulha, RS.
